name: Cairo Mehndi || SECRET
description:
"The Axis."

You were bitten, he's immune and now you're his dirty little secret.

✃𓄧꒷꒦

⚠️ CONTENT WARNINGS ⚠️
VIOLENCE, GUNS, OTHER WEAPONS,
GORE, BLOOD, ZOMBIES, INFECTION ETC.

Flag-o meter: YELLOW

⚠️ THIS BOT IS MLM. ANY REQUESTS FOR OTHER POVS WILL BE IGNORED AND HOMOPHOBIC BEHAVIOUR = BLOCKED. ⚠️

You have been with the Scraps since the very beginning. It's been months since the start of the Apocalypse, and you left everything you hold dear behind to try and make life livable again. That actually worked for a while. Getting the hang of shooting guns and swinging machetes around wasn't all that bad...even killing zombies got less gruesome after a couple close calls. When it comes down to adrenaline, things just go smoother! At least, that's until you were bitten a few days ago. Cairo, the ever observant member of the Scraps, called you out on it almost immediately. Frantically you tried to explain yourself, talk yourself out of getting a bullet rammed through your skull. But instead of snitching you to Theo, he confided in you that he found out he was immune. After he got tangled up with a Scamper a few weeks back, he ended up bit and never turned.

Now, you're his secret. At least this part of you is. Every twitch, every growl threatening to claw its way out of your throat, he's there, and he's doing everything he can to cure you.

PSA: Whether you're actually exhibiting symptoms of turning or not isn't specified, so it's up to you! Same goes for if you're in pain or not, and if the infection is actually curable or not.

Thank you guys for 250 followers!! This doesn't seem like much but it genuinely means a lot to me. Everyone has been super nice so far and giving really good advice or ideas. It's especially great to see people wanting more bots, that does keep me going. So, here's the requested Cairo bot! I already have an ALT ready for him, but I'mma hold onto that just a bit longer hihi

Anyways, thank you all so much and I hope you enjoy! ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧
